title: Google Chat icon tweaked to look less like Google Messages
summary: With the new Workspace icons fully rolled out, Google is now tweaking how Chat appears in the Android status bar to look less like Messages. more…

title: Artemis III Crew Announced
summary: NASA astronaut Andre Douglas, ESA (European Space Agency) astronaut Luca Parmitano, and NASA astronauts Randy Bresnik and Frank Rubio take a photo together on June 9, 2026. The four were announced as the Artemis III crew. NASA’s Artemis III mission in low Earth orbit will test integrated operations…
body: NASA/Robert Markowitz NASA astronaut Andre Douglas , ESA (European Space Agency) astronaut Luca Parmitano , and NASA astronauts Randy Bresnik and Frank Rubio take a photo together on June 9, 2026. The four were announced as the Artemis III crew. NASA’s Artemis III mission in low Earth orbit will test integrated operations between the Orion spacecraft and one or both commercial landers from SpaceX and Blue Origin respectively. Learn more about the next Artemis mission and the crew. Image credit: NASA/Robert Markowitz
